goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, k0) }

proof: not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, eps) or x0 ∈ s.c } or not x ∈ s.c or not eps.is_positive
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, eps) and not w0 ∈ s.c }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, eps) or x0 ∈ s.c }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, k0) implies s.c.contains(x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_close(x1, k0) or x2 ∈ x0 } }) = is_interior_point(x0, x1) }(s.c, x)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { s.contains(k0) and k0.is_close(x, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ x0 and k0.is_close(x1, x2) } }(s, x, eps)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, eps) or x0 ∈ s.c } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, eps) and not x0 ∈ s.c) }(y)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Real](closure(s).c, interior(s.c))
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ closure(s).c and not w0 ∈ interior(s.c) }
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ closure(x0).c or x1 ∈ interior(x0.c) }(s, w0)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Real](interior(s.c), closure(s).c)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ interior(s.c) and not w0 ∈ closure(s).c }
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ interior(x0.c) or x1 ∈ closure(x0).c }(s, w0)
